name: starshub
description: StarsHub - GitHub 星标管理 uTools 插件

scripts.sync-version: powershell -Command "$tag = git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>$null; if ($tag) { $ver = $tag -replace 'v',''; $pkg = Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $pkg.version = $ver; $pkg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content package.json; Write-Output ('synced: ' + $ver) }"
scripts.release: npm run sync-version && tsc && vite build && powershell -Command "$d='release'; if(Test-Path $d){Remove-Item $d -Recurse -Force}; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $d|Out-Null; Copy-Item plugin.json,preload.js,logo.png $d; Copy-Item dist $d\dist -Recurse; Write-Output 'release ready'"
